overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from an open-world game depicting an ancient Mediterranean coastal settlement. The player character explores a salt flat harbor area, crossing wooden bridges and walking along docks while NPCs engage in daily activities. The environment features turquoise water, white salt mounds, stone fortifications, and wooden cranes under a partly cloudy afternoon sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden footbridge crossing turquoise mineral pool

events.description: camera tilts down to look at wooden bridge planks and clear water flowing beneath

agents.ego_description: carefully walking across a narrow wooden bridge, glancing down at the ropes and planks over the turquoise water

entered.detail: large multi-level stone building with wooden scaffolding on a rocky outcrop
rickety wooden bridge made of planks and rope bindings crossing the water
white conical pile of harvested salt on the shore
simple wooden structure with thatched roof on the right bank
clear turquoise water with visible rocky bottom beneath the bridge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a stone fortress across a turquoise pool. The camera moves forward across a rickety wooden footbridge, looking down at the planks and rope bindings. White salt mounds and a wooden shed are visible on the right shore as the bridge crossing continues.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with docked ancient vessels and fishing activity

events.description: exits covered bridge onto open rocky shoreline revealing the harbor and sea
turns right to follow the coastline past NPCs standing near the water

agents.ego_description: emerging from the bridge to explore the shoreline, observing NPCs and a large trireme with red sails in the harbor

notable_agents.action: standing at the water's edge holding a scroll and looking out to sea
walking along the rocky shore carrying goods near a small sailboat

entered.detail: rocky coast with patches of sand and salt deposits along the water
large ancient warship with distinctive red sails docked in the harbor
misty mountain range visible across the water in the background
small wooden boat with white sail floating near the shore

segments.scene_description: Exiting the bridge, the scene opens to a wide harbor view with a trireme and small sailboats. NPCs in ancient clothing stand along the rocky shore, one examining a scroll while another walks nearby. The camera moves along the coastline with misty mountains visible across the turquoise water.

scene_state.functional_zone: salt flat processing area with white mineral mounds and wooden cranes

events.description: turns inland away from shore into the salt flat working area with industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the salt flat area among white mineral mounds, approaching wooden cranes and stone warehouses

entered.detail: ground covered with white salt deposits and shallow pools of brine
multiple conical piles of harvested salt scattered across the flat ground
tall wooden cargo crane with counterweight for loading ships
large stone building with wooden doors for storing goods

segments.scene_description: Turning inland from the coast, the camera moves through a working salt flat area dotted with white mineral mounds. Wooden cargo cranes and stone warehouses indicate industrial activity. The ground is covered with salt deposits and shallow brine pools as the path leads toward the dock structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden cargo dock extending into the open sea with waves

events.description: steps onto wooden dock extending over the water, leaving the salt flats behind
reaches the end of the dock and pans camera across the open ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden dock to its end, then stopping to survey the open sea, distant islands, and rolling waves

entered.detail: long wooden pier extending into the sea with posts and hanging cargo baskets
expansive turquoise ocean with gentle waves and whitecaps
mountainous islands visible on the horizon across the water

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves onto a long wooden dock extending into the open sea. Leaving the salt flats behind, the camera walks along the pier past cargo equipment to the end, where it pans across the expansive ocean view. Rolling turquoise waves stretch toward distant mountainous islands under a partly cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a fortified coastal entrance through an industrial salt harbor and out toward the open sea. It begins by crossing a rickety wooden footbridge over a turquoise pool, passing white salt mounds and a small shed while heading toward a stone fortress. As the camera exits the bridge, the view expands into a wide harbor filled with triremes and sailboats, moving along a rocky shoreline where NPCs in ancient clothing gather against a backdrop of misty mountains. The scene then shifts inland through a working salt flat area, weaving between mineral mounds, wooden cargo cranes, and stone warehouses. Finally, the camera leaves the industrial flats behind to walk the length of a long wooden dock, ending with a wide pan across rolling turquoise waves and distant mountainous islands under a partly cloudy sky.
